name: The Power Elite (High Y, Low Z)
description: Template: High Status, Transactional, Detached. (e.g., NYC: Finance Bro; Shanghai: Old Money Heir; Cyberpunk: Corp Exec; Xianxia: Sect Elder).

name: The Underground Rebel (Low Y, Low X)
description: Template: Authentic, Messy, Cynical. (e.g., NYC: Bushwick Artist; Shanghai: Changle Road Hipster; Cyberpunk: Netrunner; Xianxia: Rogue Cultivator).

name: The Intense Seeker (High X, High Z)
description: Template: Interview Mode, Anxious for Stability. (e.g., NYC: Marriage Seeker; Shanghai: Matchmaking Corner Parent; Cyberpunk: Settlement Founder).

name: The Mass Market Normie (Mid Range)
description: Template: Comfort-seeking, Drama-averse. Just wants to survive the system.
